Types

AnthropicMessage = ref object
  role*: string
  content*: JsonNode
Source   Edit   
AnthropicMetadata = ref object
  user_id*: Option[string]
Source   Edit   
AnthropicTool = ref object
  name*: string
  input_schema*: AnthropicToolInputSchema
  description*: Option[string]
  cache_control*: Option[CacheControl]
Source   Edit   
AnthropicToolInputSchema = ref object
  properties*: Option[JsonNode]
  required*: Option[seq[string]]
Source   Edit

  input_tokens*: int
  output_tokens*: int
  cache_creation_input_tokens*: Option[int]
  cache_read_input_tokens*: Option[int]
Source   Edit   
AudioTranscription = object
  text*: string
Source   Edit   
BedrockConfig = object
  region*: string
  profile*: string
Source   Edit   
CacheControl = ref object
  ttl*: Option[string]
Source   Edit   
ChatCompletionCallback = proc (req: CreateChatCompletionReq;
                               resp: CreateChatCompletionResp)
Source   Edit   
ChatCompletionChunk = object
  id*: string
  created*: int
  model*: string
  system_fingerprint*: string
  choices*: seq[CreateChatMessage]
Source   Edit   
CreateChatCompletionReq = ref object
  messages*: seq[Message]
  model*: string
  frequency_penalty*: Option[float32]
  logit_bias*: Option[Table[string, float32]]
  logprobs*: Option[bool]
  top_logprobs*: Option[int]
  max_tokens*: Option[int]
  n*: Option[int]
  presence_penalty*: Option[float32]
  response_format*: Option[ResponseFormatObj]
  temperature*: Option[float32]
  seed*: Option[int]
  stop*: Option[string]
  stream*: Option[bool]
  top_p*: Option[float32]
  tools*: Option[seq[Tool]]
  tool_choice*: Option[JsonNode]
  user*: Option[string]
Source   Edit   
CreateChatCompletionResp = ref object
  id*: string
  choices*: seq[CreateChatMessage]
  created*: int
  model*: string
  system_fingerprint*: string
  usage*: Usage
Source   Edit   
CreateChatMessage = ref object
  finish_reason*: string
  index*: int
  message*: Option[RespMessage]
  delta*: Option[RespMessage]
  log_probs*: Option[JsonNode]
Source   Edit   
CreateEmbeddingReq = ref object
  input*: string
  model*: string
  encoding_format*: Option[string]
  dimensions*: Option[int]
  user*: Option[string]
Source   Edit   
CreateEmbeddingResp = ref object
  data*: seq[CreateEmbeddingRespObj]
  model*: string
  usage*: Usage
Source   Edit   
CreateEmbeddingRespObj = ref object
  index*: int
  embedding*: seq[float32]
Source   Edit   
CreateMessageReq = ref object
  model*: string
  max_tokens*: int
  messages*: seq[AnthropicMessage]
  system*: Option[JsonNode]
  metadata*: Option[AnthropicMetadata]
  stop_sequences*: Option[seq[string]]
  stream*: Option[bool]
  temperature*: Option[float32]
  thinking*: Option[ThinkingConfig]
  tool_choice*: Option[ToolChoiceConfig]
  tools*: Option[seq[AnthropicTool]]
  top_k*: Option[int]
  top_p*: Option[float32]
  output_config*: Option[OutputConfig]
  service_tier*: Option[string]
Source   Edit   
CreateMessageResp = ref object
  id*: string
  role*: string
  content*: seq[JsonNode]
  model*: string
  stop_reason*: Option[string]
  stop_sequence*: Option[string]
  usage*: AnthropicUsage
Source   Edit   
CreateResponseReq = ref object
  input*: Option[seq[ResponseInput]]
  instructions*: Option[string]
  model*: string
  background*: Option[bool]
  max_output_tokens*: Option[int]
  max_tool_calls*: Option[int]
  metadata*: Option[Table[string, string]]
  parallel_tool_calls*: Option[bool]
  previous_response_id*: Option[string]
  prompt*: Option[JsonNode]
  prompt_cache_key*: Option[string]
  reasoning*: Option[JsonNode]
  safety_identifier*: Option[string]
  service_tier*: Option[string]
  store*: Option[bool] = (val: false, has: true)
  stream*: Option[bool]
  stream_options*: Option[JsonNode]
  temperature*: Option[float32]
  text*: Option[JsonNode]
  tool_choice*: Option[JsonNode]
  tools*: Option[seq[ResponseTool]]
  top_logprobs*: Option[int]
  top_p*: Option[float32]
  truncation*: Option[string]
  user*: Option[string]
Source   Edit

  id*: string
  deleted*: bool
Source   Edit   
DeleteResponse = ref object
  id*: string
  deleted*: bool
Source   Edit

  source*: DocumentSource
  cache_control*: Option[CacheControl]
  title*: Option[string]
  context*: Option[string]

DocumentSource = ref object
  media_type*: Option[string]
  data*: Option[string]
  url*: Option[string]
Source   Edit   
EmbeddingTask = enum
  RetrievalQuery, RetrievalDocument, QuestionAnswering, FactVerification,
  Classification, Clustering, SemanticSimilarity, CodeRetrieval
Source   Edit   
FineTuneError = ref object
  code*: string
  param*: string
  message*: string
Source   Edit   
ImageBlock = ref object
  source*: ImageSource
  cache_control*: Option[CacheControl]
Source   Edit   
ImageSource = ref object
  media_type*: Option[string]
  data*: Option[string]
  url*: Option[string]
Source   Edit   
ImageUrlPart = ref object
  url*: string
  detail*: Option[string]
Source   Edit   
ListModelResponse = ref object
  data*: seq[OpenAiModel]
Source   Edit   
Message = ref object
  content*: Option[seq[MessageContentPart]]
  role*: string
  name*: Option[string]
  tool_calls*: Option[seq[ToolResp]]
  tool_call_id*: Option[string]
ChatGPT Message object for chat completions and responses NB. content can be a string or a sequence of MessageContentPart objects, however this cannot be expressed in Nim easily, so we require a sequence of MessageContentPart objects Source   Edit   
MessageContentPart = ref object
  text*: Option[string]
  image_url*: Option[ImageUrlPart]
Source   Edit   
MessageStreamEvent = ref object
  message*: Option[CreateMessageResp]
  index*: Option[int]
  content_block*: Option[JsonNode]
  delta*: Option[JsonNode]
  usage*: Option[AnthropicUsage]
Source   Edit   
OpenAiApi = ptr OpenAiApiObj
Source   Edit   
OpenAiApiObj = object
  curly*: Curly
  lock*: Lock
  baseUrl*: string
  curlTimeout*: int
  apiKey*: string
  organization*: string
  useBearerForMessages*: bool
Source   Edit   
OpenAiError = object of CatchableError
Raised if an operation fails. Source   Edit   
OpenAIFile = ref object
  id*: string
  bytes*: int
  created_at*: int
  filename*: string
  purpose*: string
Source   Edit   
OpenAIFineTuneChat = ref object
  messages*: seq[OpenAIFineTuneMessage]
Source   Edit   
OpenAIFinetuneJob = ref object
  id*: string
  model*: string
  created_at*: int
  fine_tuned_model*: Option[string]
  organization_id*: string
  status*: string
  training_file*: string
  validation_file*: string
  result_files*: seq[string]
  error*: Option[FineTuneError]
  user_provided_suffix*: Option[string]
  seed*: int
Source   Edit   
OpenAIFinetuneList = ref object
  data*: seq[OpenAIFinetuneJob]
  has_more*: bool
Source   Edit   
OpenAIFineTuneMessage = ref object
  role*: string
  content*: string
Source   Edit

  model*: string
  training_file*: string
  hyperparameters*: Option[OpenAIHyperParameters]
  suffix*: Option[string]
  validation_file*: Option[string]
  seed*: Option[int]
Source   Edit

  batch_size*: Option[int]
  learning_rate_multiplier*: Option[float]
  n_epochs*: Option[int]
Source   Edit

  data*: seq[OpenAIFile]
Source   Edit   
OpenAiModel = ref object
  id*: string
  created*: int
  owned_by*: string
Source   Edit   
OpenAiResponse = ref object
  id*: string
  created_at*: int
  model*: string
  status*: string
  error*: Option[JsonNode]
  incomplete_details*: Option[string]
  instructions*: Option[string]
  max_output_tokens*: Option[int]
  max_tool_calls*: Option[int]
  metadata*: Option[Table[string, string]]
  output*: seq[ResponseOutput]
  output_text*: Option[string]
  parallel_tool_calls*: Option[bool]
  previous_response_id*: Option[string]
  prompt*: Option[JsonNode]
  prompt_cache_key*: Option[string]
  reasoning*: Option[JsonNode]
  safety_identifier*: Option[string]
  service_tier*: Option[string]
  store*: Option[bool]
  temperature*: Option[float32]
  text*: Option[JsonNode]
  tool_choice*: Option[JsonNode]
  tools*: Option[seq[Tool]]
  top_logprobs*: Option[int]
  top_p*: Option[float32]
  truncation*: Option[string]
  usage*: Option[ResponseUsage]
  user*: Option[string]
Source   Edit

  stream*: ResponseStream
  buffer*: string
Source   Edit   
OpenAIStream = ref object
  stream*: ResponseStream
  buffer*: string
Source   Edit

  bearerToken*: string = ""
  organization*: string = ""
  curlTimeout*: int = 0

  effort*: Option[string]
  format*: Option[JsonNode]

  content*: string

  name*: Option[string]
  tool_calls*: Option[seq[ToolResp]]
  refusal*: Option[string]

  output*: Option[string]

  arguments*: Option[string]

  text*: Option[string]
  tool_call*: Option[ResponseOutputToolCall]

  name*: string
Source   Edit

  name*: string

Source   Edit

  name*: string
  arguments*: string
Source   Edit   
ToolImpl = proc (args: JsonNode): string
Source   Edit

  id*: string
  function*: ToolFunctionResp
Source   Edit

  tool_use_id*: string

  is_error*: Option[bool]

  text*: Option[string]
  source*: Option[ImageSource]
Source   Edit

Source   Edit

  id*: string

  input*: JsonNode
  cache_control*: Option[CacheControl]
Source   Edit

  id*: string
  name*: string
  input*: JsonNode

  prompt_tokens*: int
  total_tokens*: int

Procs

proc `[]`(table: ResponseToolsTable; key: string): (ToolFunction, ToolImpl) {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc `[]=`(table: var ResponseToolsTable; key: string;
           value: (ToolFunction, ToolImpl)) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc close(api: OpenAiApi) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Clean up the OpenAPI API client. Source   Edit   
proc delete(api: OpenAiApi; path: string): Response {.
    ...raises: [ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Make a DELETE request to the OpenAI API. Source   Edit   
proc get(api: OpenAiApi; path: string; opts: Opts = Opts()): Response {.
    ...raises: [ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Make a GET request to the OpenAI API. Source   Edit   
proc getStream(api: OpenAiApi; path: string;
               queryParams: seq[(string, string)] = @[]; opts: Opts = Opts()): ResponseStream {.
    ...raises: [CatchableError, OpenAiError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Make a streaming GET request to the OpenAI API. Source   Edit   
proc hasKey(table: ResponseToolsTable; key: string): bool {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc len(table: ResponseToolsTable): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc newOpenAiApi(baseUrl: string = "https://api.openai.com/v1";
                  apiKey: string = ""; organization: string = "";
                  maxInFlight: int = 16; curlTimeout: int = 60 * 5): OpenAiApi {.
    ...raises: [ResourceExhaustedError], tags: [ReadEnvEffect], forbids: [].}
Initialize a new OpenAI API client. Will use the provided apiKey, or look for the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable. apiKey may also be provided on a per-request basis. Source   Edit   
proc newResponseToolsTable(): ResponseToolsTable {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Create a new empty response tools table Source   Edit   
proc post(api: OpenAiApi; path: string; body: string; opts: Opts = Opts()): Response {.
    ...raises: [ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Make a POST request to the OpenAI API. Source   Edit   
proc postStream(api: OpenAiApi; path: string; body: string; opts: Opts = Opts()): ResponseStream {.
    ...raises: [CatchableError, OpenAiError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Make a streaming POST request to the OpenAI API. Source   Edit   
proc register(table: var ResponseToolsTable; name: string;
              toolFunc: ToolFunction; impl: ToolImpl) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Add a tool to the response tools table Source   Edit   
proc registerResponseTool(table: var ResponseToolsTable; name: string;
                          toolFunc: ToolFunction; impl: ToolImpl) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add a tool to the response tools table (deprecated; use register) Source   Edit   
proc sanitizeChatReq(req: var CreateChatCompletionReq) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Sanitize a chat request prior to JSON serialization. Source   Edit   
proc sanitizeText(s: string): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Strip ANSI escape sequences from plain text. Source   Edit   
proc stripEscapeSequences(input: string): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Remove ANSI escape sequences from a string to ensure valid JSON payloads. Source   Edit   
proc updateApiKey(api: OpenAiApi; apiKey: string) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Update the API key for the OpenAI API client. Source   Edit
